message:
fix(codegen): Fix undeclared identifier errors in numpy modules

Phase 3 progress - reduced errors from 67 to 63:

- Fix stop_ variable naming inconsistency between declaration and reference
  by using explicit var_renames lookup in expressions.zig
- Always emit c_interop import (DCE removes if unused) since C extension
  method calls are detected during codegen after imports are emitted
- Add __sys_byteorder constant to module mode for sys.byteorder access
- Add needs_c_interop flag to NativeCodegen and ModuleAnalysis
- Fix for-loop variable tracking in TryHelper for tuple/list unpacking
- Restore written_outer_vars and declared_vars to tracking maps before
  generating exception handlers in try-except blocks
